response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman with strong expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but he lacks the deep, recent C++ and STL experience required for this role. The position demands an architect-level C++ developer with knowledge of industrial automation, IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus), and secure development standards (IEC 62443), none of which are present in his background. While his general seniority and advantageous web skills (React, Node.js) are notable, the fundamental mismatch in core technologies makes him unsuitable for this specific position.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (15+ years) with a strong focus on architecture, microservices, and TDD.
Possesses advantageous skills listed in the job description, including deep expertise in Node.js and React.
Demonstrated leadership and mentoring abilities through organizing workshops, refactoring dojos, and founding his own platform.
concerns: Severe lack of recent or extensive C++ and STL experience, having only a brief 6-month stint with C/C++ over a decade ago.
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation, IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA), or message-broker-based C++ applications.
Missing required expertise in industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) and Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices.
